label: HIL Quick Test
description: All-in-one HIL block: Board Config + Synthesize + Deploy + Run in a single node. Supports MMIO and DMA modes. Requires Vivado running (unless cached) and PYNQ board connected.

parameters.label: Code
parameters.default:
import sys, os
import numpy as np
import requests
from urllib.parse import urljoin
os.chdir("D:/Claude/HiyoCanvas")
sys.path.insert(0, "D:/Claude/HiyoCanvas/hil/scripts")
from axi_wrapper import generate_hil_design
from vivado_build import build_hil_overlay
from pynq_deploy import PYNQDeployer, HILBoardConfig
from pynq_run import run_on_hardware, run_on_hardware_dma

io_mode = "${io_mode}"

# === 1. Board Config ===
print("=== 1/4 Board Connection ===")
hil_config = HILBoardConfig(board_type="${board_type}", host="${host}")
deployer = PYNQDeployer(config=hil_config)
status = deployer.check_connection()
jup = "OK" if status["jupyter"] else "FAILED"
ssh = "OK" if status["ssh"] else "FAILED"
print(f"  Jupyter: {jup}, SSH: {ssh}")
if not status["connected"]:
    raise ConnectionError("Cannot connect to PYNQ board")

# Clean up stale Jupyter kernels
print("  Cleaning stale kernels...")
try:
    session = requests.Session()
    base_url = hil_config.base_url
    login_url = urljoin(base_url, "/login")
    resp = session.get(login_url, timeout=10)
    xsrf = session.cookies.get('_xsrf')
    if xsrf:
        session.post(login_url, data={'password': hil_config.password, '_xsrf': xsrf}, headers={'X-XSRFToken': xsrf}, timeout=10, allow_redirects=False)
        session.get(base_url, timeout=10)
        xsrf = session.cookies.get('_xsrf')
    headers = {'X-XSRFToken': xsrf} if xsrf else {}
    resp = session.get(urljoin(base_url, '/api/kernels'), headers=headers, timeout=10)
    if resp.status_code == 200:
        for k in resp.json():
            session.delete(urljoin(base_url, f"/api/kernels/{k['id']}"), headers=headers, timeout=10)
        n = len(resp.json())
        if n > 0:
            print(f"  Cleaned {n} stale kernel(s)")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"  Kernel cleanup warning: {e}")

# === 2. Synthesize ===
print("\n=== 2/4 Synthesize ===")
hil_design = generate_hil_design(${module_var}, output_dir="D:/Claude/HiyoCanvas/hil/build/${project_name}", io_mode=io_mode)
build_result = build_hil_overlay(
    verilog_dir="D:/Claude/HiyoCanvas/hil/build/${project_name}",
    board_type="${board_type}", project_name="${project_name}"
)
cached = build_result.get("cached", False)
print(f"  {'Cached' if cached else 'Built'} (hash: {build_result['design_hash']})")

# === 3. Deploy ===
print("\n=== 3/4 Deploy ===")
base_addr = 0x40000000  # Fixed for Zynq M_AXI_GP0
dma_base_addr = 0x40400000  # Fixed DMA address

if io_mode == "dma" and cached:
    # DMA cached: skip Overlay entirely (direct MMIO in run step)
    print(f"  Cached DMA: skip Overlay (direct MMIO)")
    print(f"  User IP base: 0x{base_addr:08X}")
    print(f"  DMA base: 0x{dma_base_addr:08X}")
else:
    # First run or MMIO mode: deploy overlay normally
    deploy_result = deployer.deploy_overlay(bit_path=build_result["bit_path"], hwh_path=build_result["hwh_path"])
    if not deploy_result["success"]:
        err = deploy_result.get("error", "unknown")
        raise RuntimeError(f"Deploy failed: {err}")
    dep_addr = deploy_result.get("base_addr")
    if dep_addr:
        base_addr = dep_addr
        print(f"  User IP base: 0x{base_addr:08X}")
    if io_mode == "dma":
        ip_dict = deploy_result.get("ip_dict", {})
        for ip_name, ip_info in ip_dict.items():
            if "dma" in ip_name.lower():
                dma_base_addr = ip_info.get("phys_addr", 0)
                print(f"  DMA base: 0x{dma_base_addr:08X}")
                break

# === 4. Run ===
print("\n=== 4/4 Run ===")
reg_map = build_result["register_map"]
input_signals = {}
for input_name in reg_map["inputs"]:
    input_signals[input_name] = np.array(${input_var}, dtype=int)
    break

n_out = ${n_out_samples}
n_out = n_out if n_out > 0 else None

if io_mode == "dma":
    run_result = run_on_hardware_dma(
        deployer=deployer, register_map=reg_map,
        base_addr=base_addr, dma_base_addr=dma_base_addr,
        input_data=input_signals, n_out_samples=n_out,
        cached=cached,
        bit_path=build_result.get("bit_path"),
        hwh_path=build_result.get("hwh_path"),
        timeout=120
    )
else:
    run_result = run_on_hardware(
        deployer=deployer, register_map=reg_map,
        base_addr=base_addr, input_data=input_signals
    )

if not run_result["success"]:
    err = run_result.get("error", "unknown")
    raise RuntimeError(f"HIL run failed: {err}")
for name, data in run_result["outputs"].items():
    ${output_var} = data
    n = len(data)
    print(f"  Output: {name}, {n} samples, range [{data.min()}, {data.max()}]")
    if io_mode == "dma" and run_result.get("elapsed_ms"):
        ms = run_result["elapsed_ms"]
        print(f"  FPGA time: {ms:.1f} ms ({n/ms*1000:.0f} samples/sec)")
    break

deployer.cleanup()
print("\nDone! Result in: ${output_var}")
